data.content:
The build confirms the issue. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file but **never adds it to the `@(Compile)` item group**. MSBuild globs expand at evaluation time (before targets run), so the generated file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `Compile` and register it in `FileWrites` for proper clean support.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to Compile so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. 

In MSBuild, globs are expanded at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the generated file won't be picked up by the default glob. The target needs to explicitly add the generated file to the `@(Compile)` item group so the compiler includes it.

The fix is to add an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target that adds the generated file to the `Compile` items after it's created. Also, we should register it in `FileWrites` for clean support.


I should check the `including-generated-files` skill to see how this pattern is typically handled.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to Compile so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
**Diagnosis:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote the file during the build, but MSBuild's default `**/*.cs` glob expands at *evaluation time* — before any targets execute. The generated file didn't exist yet, so it was never included in compilation.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to explicitly include the generated file in `@(Compile)` (and `@(FileWrites)` for clean support). This is the standard pattern for build-time generated sources.
